title: hypericum revolutum subsp. keniense
intro: Hypericum revolutum subsp. keniense, also known as the Kenyan St. John's Wort, is a plant species in the St. John's Wort genus, native to Eastern Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and other health issues. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Hypericum revolutum subsp. keniense is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
